imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.subtitle: Information pursuant to § 5 TMG and § 18 (2) MStV
imprint.disclaimerBody: The contents of this website are created with utmost care. However, the operator does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the provided content. Use of the content is at your own risk. In particular, we accept no liability for the accuracy of event data imported from external sources.
imprint.linksBody: This website contains links to external third-party websites. We have no influence on their content and assume no responsibility for it. The respective provider is always responsible for the content of linked pages.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.controllerBody: The party responsible for data processing on this website is:
privacy.registrationBody: When you register, we collect your email address and optionally a display name. Your password is stored exclusively as a cryptographic hash. This data is processed to provide your user account (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
privacy.eventsBody: When you create events or posts, this content is associated with your user account and displayed publicly.
privacy.geolocationBody: The proximity search uses your browser's Geolocation API. This feature is only activated with your explicit consent. Your location is not stored on our servers.
privacy.serverLogsBody: When you access our website, your browser automatically transmits information stored in server log files: IP address, browser type and version, time of access. This data is stored to ensure operations (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) and deleted after 30 days.
privacy.localStorageBody: We use your browser's local storage (localStorage) to store authentication data, your design preference (light/dark), language setting, and filter settings. This is technically necessary data that remains exclusively in your browser.
privacy.sendgridBody: We use SendGrid by Twilio Inc. (USA) to send emails (e.g. login codes). Your email address and message content are transmitted to SendGrid. Data transfer to the USA is based on Standard Contractual Clauses (Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR).
privacy.osmBody: To display maps, we load map tiles from OpenStreetMap servers. Your IP address is transmitted to the OpenStreetMap Foundation (OSMF). For more information, see the OSMF privacy policy: https://wiki.osmfoundation.org/wiki/Privacy_Policy
privacy.legalBasisBody: Your data is processed on the following legal bases:
privacy.legalBasisContract: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) — e.g. providing your user account
privacy.legalBasisLegitimate: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) — e.g. server logs for security
privacy.retentionBody: Your account data is stored for as long as your user account exists. Server log files are automatically deleted after 30 days. When you delete your account, your personal data is removed immediately, unless legal retention requirements apply.
privacy.rightsBody: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.rightAccess: Access to your stored data (Art. 15 GDPR)
privacy.authorityBody: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority regarding the processing of your personal data.
privacy.transferBody: Through the use of SendGrid (Twilio Inc., USA), data is transferred to the USA. The transfer is secured by Standard Contractual Clauses pursuant to Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.scopeBody: These terms of use apply to the use of the VeloCal platform (velocal.cc). By registering or using the platform, you agree to these terms.
terms.registrationBody: Certain features require registration. You are obligated to provide truthful information and keep your login credentials confidential.
terms.contentBody: Users can create events and posts. You are solely responsible for the content you submit and grant VeloCal a simple, perpetual right to display and distribute it on the platform.
terms.conductBody: The following is prohibited when using the platform:
terms.conductNoSpam: Creating spam events or repeated irrelevant entries
terms.conductNoAbuse: Abusing the platform or harassing other users
terms.liabilityBody: VeloCal provides event information that is partially imported automatically from external sources. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of this data. Participation in events is at your own risk.
terms.terminationBody: You can delete your account at any time. VeloCal reserves the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms of use.
terms.moderationBody: VeloCal reserves the right to review, edit, or remove user-generated content that violates applicable law or these terms of use.
terms.changesBody: We reserve the right to modify these terms of use at any time. Registered users will be notified of material changes by email.
terms.jurisdictionBody: The laws of the Federal Republic of Germany shall apply.

errors.notFoundMessage: The requested page does not exist.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
